rulings.Case Title: RE SOCORRO S. ARTATES -TRUST 1992
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition Concerning Internal Affairs Of The Trust
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible. Please review the 9th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their full name. ISSUES (may be addressed at hearing): 1) Matter set for hearing for the court to determine how to proceed. 2) Petitioner requests a. Petitioners be confirmed as trustee. b. Respondents account from August 1, 1999 through present. c. John Artates pay market rate for his tenancy at Chenery Street Property. d. Trustees include the issue of all of settlor's deceased children as income distributes. e. The agreement of at least 4 of settler's children or issue of deceased children be required regarding management of Chenery Street. f. Trust Estate be reimbursed for any expenditures found to be improper or income which cannot be properly accounted for.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SERGE JOHN WHITE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Issues may include (but not limited to): 1) The administrator has not segregated the estate funds exceeding the FDIC limit; and 2) The inventory and appraisal has not been corrected to exclude community property and the surviving spouse's intestate share of the decedent's separate property. No Probate Code section 13502(b) election has been made by the personal representative of the surviving spouse's estate, nor has the administrator petitioned for relief under Probate Code section 13502.5. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties must, whenever possible, appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review the Court's 9th Amended General Order which took effect on 02/10/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DEBORAH ANN ARMSTRONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible. Please review the 9th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their full name. Issues: same issues as prior hearing. Attorney has not filed anything since last hearing. 1) Attorney is requesting $1,750.00 in extraordinary compensation. This request for $1,750.00 was denied in both Estate of Cleonia Kemp and Estate of Louis Armstrong. Unclear why attorney did not withdraw the request when the Amended petition was filed. 2) Attorney filed an Ex Parte Petition to Withdraw Funds From A Blocked Account but has not followed local rules regarding ex parte petitions. [LRSF 14.11] 3) Attaching a copy of a proposed order to a petition or supplement and telling the court to use that order is not proper procedure. Please provide a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 before the hearing date.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF NEIL KEENEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/19/2021 to allow a court investigator report to be completed. 1) No proposed order has been received. 2) No original statements of the bank accounts listed on Schedule 1 as of 07/17/2019 are on file. 3) No original statements of the accounts listed on Schedules E & F as of 11/30/2020 are on file. 4) A copy of the GC-341 does not appear to have been served on the court-appointed counsel for the conservatee. 5) Neither the petition caption nor item 1 of the GC-020 form included the request for authority to enter into an exclusive listing agreement with the proposed broker. 6) The monthly allowance amount stated in paragraph 5b appears incorrect. 7) Paragraph 8 mentions the conservatee's mortgage, but Schedule H does not show any liabilities. 8) Paragraph 11 must include an allegation required by LRSF 14.48(J)(3). 9) Please provide legal authority for waiver of publication of notice of sale in conservatorship matters. LRSF 14.31(A) & Probate Code section 10302. 10) The ending date stated in the summary of account appears incorrect. 11) The "cash found in home" listed on Schedule 1 is not included in the inventory and appraisal on file. 12) Does the conservatee have a car? The petitioner's time entry on 09/20/2019 refers to "DMV to apply for new title", but neither the inventory and appraisal nor Schedule 1 listed any car. 13) The market values of the real properties listed on Schedule E are different from those listed on Schedule F. 14) Did the tenant pay a security deposit to the conservatee? Schedule H does not show any liabilities. 15) No Probate Listing Addendum and Advisory is attached to Exhibit E, nor does Exhibit E appear to contain any provision clarifying that the broker's commissions are subject to the Court's approval. 16) The proposed broker/agent's experience and qualifications must be provided. LRSF 14.30(B). 17) What is the estimated amount of capital gain taxes based on the proposed listing price?

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HILDA CANALES
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/18/2021. 1. Petitioner needs to file proof of publication. 2. Petitioner needs to file Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DAVID DANIEL LOWERY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/11/21. Proposed order must be provided and all required supplemental pleadings must be filed and filed stamped copy provided to Room 202 at least 2 weeks prior. No review has been conducted.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LOUIS HERBERT NARCISSE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: continued to 5/11/21. notes emailed to counsel on 4/16/21 at 1:13 p.m.
